pre_game.message: Hi, I'm G — I love games and I'm excited to try my luck; what's your name and are you planning to play aggressively or play it safe?
I'm A — I'll play aggressively; my family's counting on me to win the deposit and a couple months' rent.
I hear you — that's a lot to carry. I'm planning to play aggressive too but want to size people up first; what's your opening move?
I'll go big early — take a large chunk to set the pace, watch people's reactions for tells, and adjust as needed.
Bold move — I'll watch your tells and either match your aggression or pounce if you overreach. Good luck.
Appreciate it — I’ll hide my tells and stay steady; my family’s counting on me, so if you pounce be ready to face someone who won’t back down.
I respect that — same here. I’ll watch your moves and push back when needed; may the best player win.
May the best player win — just know I'm playing for my family, so I won't give you an easy opening.
I respect that — my people depend on me too; I'll play hard but fair, so bring your best.
You too — I’ll keep it sharp and fair; may the strongest player win.
You got it — fair and fierce. May the best player win.
Right back at you — see you at the table.
See you at the table — play sharp and give it your all for your family; may the strongest win.
